description: Locked VIPS label-boundary fixture for the 2026-05-13 agent-boundary pass. This is a small evaluator-facing slice, not a replacement seed corpus. It targets the user-raised ambiguity around where Values and Skills labels come from, and verifies that closed canonical IDs are enforced after Connector parsing.

canonical_runtime_policy.values_source_lists: Broad values lists are synonym and crosswalk material only; runtime IDs stay compact.
canonical_runtime_policy.skillsfuture_ccs: SkillsFuture Critical Core Skills are a source-family and crosswalk reference; runtime IDs stay the six compact skills clusters.
canonical_runtime_policy.personality: Big Five Extraversion and Neuroticism are backend reference dimensions only; student-facing output should be behavioral and non-diagnostic.

rows.transcript: I stayed after the event to help the uncle pack the chairs because everyone else had left. I was tired, but it felt important that he did not have to finish alone.

connector_candidate.verbatim_quote: it felt important that he did not have to finish alone

expected_verifier.reason: Known canonical value ID with matching quote.

rows.axis: valid quote but invented value label

rows.transcript: For the physics project I broke the circuit problem into three smaller tests, then used the failed readings to find the loose connection.

connector_candidate.verbatim_quote: broke the circuit problem into three smaller tests

rows.axis: skill evidence should not become an interest unless preference is explicit
rows.transcript: I explained the debate structure to my group and rewrote our opening so it sounded clearer. I did not love being on stage, but I liked helping the argument make sense.

preferred_candidate.verbatim_quote: rewrote our opening so it sounded clearer

avoid_without_more_evidence.reason: The quote shows communication work; it does not yet prove a stable preference for people-facing work.

rows.axis: SkillsFuture term maps into compact runtime cluster
rows.transcript: When our robotics code failed before the showcase, I tried two backup plans and changed the demo route so we could still show the sensor working.
rows.source_term: SkillsFuture Critical Core Skills: Adaptability / Problem Solving

preferred_candidate.verbatim_quote: tried two backup plans and changed the demo route
